mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, image_url, image_keyword, sort_order, is_visible, create_time FROM advantage ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO advantage (title, description, image_url, image_keyword, sort_order, is_visible, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageKeyword}, #{sortOrder}, #{isVisible}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE advantage SET is_visible = #{isVisible} WHERE id = #{id}
